narrative:
Granville Township West (precinct in Mercer County) has 598 registered voters, with 43.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 53.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 2.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 51.5 percentage points.
